title: HRMS Enhancements
problemStatement: The HR system lacked structured visibility into utilization, skill matching, and appraisal workflows.
solution: Developed utilization dashboards, skill-based resourcing tools, and an automated appraisal workflow spanning Zoho People, Creator, Recruit, and Payroll.
impact: Enabled better resource planning, reduced bench risk, and improved appraisal consistency across the employee lifecycle.
leadershipValue: Strengthened people operations by connecting workforce data, skill visibility, and appraisal governance into a more reliable decision system.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Review the people-systems redesign with utilization, resourcing, and appraisal control points.
